description: Stable citation key for audit and rendering.
Claim identifier that this citation supports or audits.
Reader-facing section associated with the citation.
Rendered prose span identifier linked to the cited claim span.
Start offset for the linked claim span in final prose.
End offset for the linked claim span in final prose.
Source packet identifier used for the citation.
Source role attributed to the cited packet.
Reader-facing source title.
Citation-level support state inherited from the mapped claim.
Whether the citation belongs to included prose or audit-only material.
Finding identifiers that provide citation lineage.
Checked excerpt that grounds the citation when available.
Human-readable source span label such as a line marker.
Optional start offset for the grounded source span.
Optional end offset for the grounded source span.
Ordered labels for grounded source multispan linkage.
Ordered start offsets for grounded source multispan linkage.
Ordered end offsets for grounded source multispan linkage.
Inspectable marker showing whether the citation points to a direct document span or multispan block.
Scope-limiting note carried from the grounded finding into citation lineage.
Trace state for claim-to-citation lineage such as `linked` or `mismatch`.
Whether provenance is complete enough for the citation to support release.
